cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Need 32 lunch combos delivered to Tower 2 lobby before 11:50 tomorrow. 20 chicken burger sets, 12 beef rice sets, 6 no spice, 4 hot drinks. Can you issue an invoice? If yes, I will send the contact and floor now.
engagement_history: added enterprise wechat after reading an office lunch post
asked about delivery radius and invoice rules
shared a draft meal split sheet

mustAvoid: downgrading the lead as casual menu browsing

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We will pick up 5 sets at IFC store at 18:40 tonight. 2 double beef combos, 2 spicy chicken combos, 1 kids meal, all drinks switched to hot. Can you get them ready first?
engagement_history: watched a full combo recommendation video

mustAvoid: treating the lead as generic menu curiosity

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We want to pick up 14 breakfast sets at Jingan Temple store at 8:20 the day after tomorrow for a morning team meeting. 8 egg wrap sets and 6 coffee sandwich sets. Can they be packed in advance?

mustAvoid: ignoring the breakfast timing and treating it as a vague future question

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: First time trying your store. Which is the safer pick, the burger or the fried chicken? Send me the menu first.

mustInclude: interest exists but intent is incomplete
mustAvoid: treating menu curiosity as a confirmed order lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Can I use the 19.9 lunch coupon at Xujiahui store on Saturday noon? If I order before 11:40, does that mean I do not need to wait much at pickup?

mustInclude: worth follow-up without overpromising queue exceptions
mustAvoid: treating every coupon question as either spam or a fully confirmed order

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Our school club needs 45 meals next week. Ideally each meal should have a name label, the delivery should happen in two waves, and we also need an invoice. The budget has to stay within 12 per meal. Can you do it?
engagement_history: asked whether split delivery is supported

mustInclude: do not auto-promote to top tier
mustAvoid: marking the lead as high-fit without checking commercial feasibility

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: Tomorrow it must arrive at our meeting room at 11:50 exactly. Every meal has to stay hot, nothing can be missing, and nobody can go downstairs to receive it. Can you guarantee that?
engagement_history: asked whether building delivery is supported
followed up twice on exact-arrival promises

mustInclude: do not mark as safe low-risk lead
mustAvoid: making absolute delivery, temperature, or upstairs-handoff guarantees

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We want 8 meals for the family on Sunday night. One person has a severe peanut and sesame allergy. Can you guarantee zero cross-contact in the back kitchen? The kids meal also must never be spicy.
engagement_history: asked whether fryer and prep areas are separated

mustInclude: real order intent but elevated risk
mustAvoid: making zero-contact or absolute safety promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: The fried chicken from yesterday's delivery was still raw inside. I have the order number, receipt, and photos. My child felt unwell after eating it. Please handle this now.

mustInclude: service escalation instead of sales push
mustAvoid: treating the complaint as a reorder opportunity

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Add me. We do fast-food operations, franchise growth, fryer equipment, and short-video matrices. We can double your order volume in one week.

mustAvoid: treating unrelated services as a valid order lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Send me all your combo prices, student meal prices, group meal floor prices, and rebate policy. I have clients who want to compare first. If it works, we can talk later.
engagement_history: added wechat from the profile page

mustInclude: do not auto-upgrade without real order facts
mustAvoid: classifying reseller fishing as a followup-ready direct buyer

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: I asked in comments already whether your Tech Park store can deliver to our office. Now I am sending the Friday lunch list for 26 meals and my phone number. Same address as discussed, Tower 3 Floor 16 lobby.
engagement_history: sent the meal split by direct message
left a callback number in enterprise wechat

mustInclude: high confidence due to repeated consistent engagement
mustAvoid: creating multiple separate high-priority leads for the same lunch order

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Your store delivered 40 lunch sets to our company last month. We want to order again this Wednesday from the same branch, around 36 meals this time, same address. I can send the old order screenshot now.
engagement_history: historical bulk-order record exists in tenant memory
asked to reuse the same branch and delivery address

mustAvoid: treating the returning client as a cold ambiguous lead
